ipcw 0.1.0
  • Get started
    • Single-event IPCW
    • Competing-risks IPCW
  • Reference

Single-event example dataset in IPCW long format

single_example_ipcw_dat.Rd

The single_example_dat dataset converted to counting-process (long) format with IPCW weights appended, as produced by the data-preparation steps in the single-event vignette (or equivalently by get_ipcw_wgt()).

data(single_example_ipcw_dat)

Format

A data frame in long format with one or more rows per subject and columns including:

id_nest

Nested simulation identifier.

id

Subject identifier.

true_time

True (latent) event time used for simulation diagnostics.

tstart

Left endpoint of the time interval.

tstop

Right endpoint of the time interval.

delta

Event indicator for the current interval.

censor

Censoring indicator for the current interval.

x

Binary treatment indicator.

W2

Ancillary biomarker covariate.

inv_wgt

Estimated probability of remaining uncensored (inverse of the weight).

wgt

Unstabilized IPCW weight (reciprocal of inv_wgt).

Source

Generated by the authors via get_ipcw_wgt() applied to single_example_dat.

Contents

Developed by Emily Zabor, Anne Eaton.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
